haiku:
Gentle breezes hum,
Petals swirl in sunlit fields,
Nature’s joy awakes.
Happy #EarthDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Rainbow jewels cascade,
Sugary whispers of cheer,
Hearts bounce with each taste.
Happy #NationalJellybeanDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Rich thoughts weave like silk,
Pages turn with quiet joy,
Cheers echo through time.
#HappyBirthdayImmanuelKant from @ClamBakeSanta
